creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
It worked for me locally and it also works on the build cluster: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy18/data/main-amd64-default/pa45a9e175af5_sa26b96a930/logs/dotnet-8.0.0.log

The problem seems to be on your side, and I'm not sure where exactly. You can probably try Szczepan's advice as a workaround.
